books.title: Atomic Habits
books.author: James Clear
books.description: A practical guide to building good habits and breaking bad ones. James Clear shares proven strategies for forming good habits, breaking bad ones, and mastering the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

books.title: Deep Work
books.author: Cal Newport
books.description: Rules for focused success in a distracted world. Cal Newport argues that the ability to perform deep work is becoming increasingly valuable and increasingly rare.

books.title: The Psychology of Money
books.author: Morgan Housel
books.description: Timeless lessons on wealth, greed, and happiness. Money is not just numbers—it is deeply tied to our psychology, emotions, and personal stories.

books.title: Dune
books.author: Frank Herbert
books.description: Set in the far future, Dune tells the story of young Paul Atreides, whose family accepts control of the desert planet Arrakis—the only source of the most valuable substance in the universe.

books.author: George Orwell
books.description: A chilling dystopia where Big Brother watches your every move. Winston Smith works for the Ministry of Truth, rewriting history to match the Party's ever-changing version of the past.

books.title: Clean Code
books.author: Robert C. Martin
books.description: A handbook of agile software craftsmanship. Robert Martin and colleagues help you understand how to write code that is clean and how to transform messy code into clean code.

books.title: The Alchemist
books.author: Paulo Coelho
books.description: A magical story about Santiago, an Andalusian shepherd boy, who yearns to travel in search of a worldly treasure. His quest leads him to riches far different from what he ever imagined.

books.title: Zero to One
books.author: Peter Thiel
books.description: Notes on startups, or how to build the future. Every moment in business happens only once. The next Bill Gates will not build an operating system. The next Larry Page will not make a search engine.

books.title: Sapiens
books.author: Yuval Noah Harari
books.description: A brief history of humankind. From a renowned historian comes a groundbreaking narrative of humanity's creation and evolution—a number-one international best seller.
